theorem:  mergesort_sorted
sample:   1
attempt:  fix_2

[proof]
unfold mergesort
split
· simp [Sorted.nil]
·
  have hl := left_less l
  have hr := right_less l
  simp

[lean error]
location:
      split
      · simp [Sorted.nil]
       ^
      ·
error: `simp` made no progress

location:
      · simp [Sorted.nil]
      ·
     ^
        have hl := left_less l
error: unsolved goals
case isFalse
T : Type u_1
inst✝¹ : Preorder T
inst✝ : DecidableRel LT.lt
l : List T
h✝ : ¬l.length < 2
hl : l.length > 0 → (left l).length < l.length
hr : l.length > 1 → (right l).length < l.length
⊢ Sorted (merge (mergesort (left l)) (mergesort (right l)))
